segments.text: You must not spread stories that are lies. You must not help bad people by giving evidence that's malicious.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Don't follow the crowd in doing wrong. When you give evidence in a lawsuit, don't corrupt justice by siding with the majority.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Don't show favoritism to poor people in their legal cases either.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: If you come across your enemy's ox or donkey that has wandered off, take it back to him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: If you see the donkey of someone who hates you that has fallen under its load, don't just leave it there. You must stop and help.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You must not prevent the poor from getting justice in their lawsuits.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Don't have anything to do with making false accusations. Don't kill the innocent or those who do right, for I won't let the guilty go unpunished.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Don't accept bribes, for a bribe blinds those who can see, and undermines the evidence of the honest.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Don't abuse foreigners living among you, since you know very well what it's like to be foreigners, for you were once foreigners in Egypt.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Six years you are to sow your land and harvest crops,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: but in the seventh year you are to let it rest and leave it uncultivated, so that poor people may eat what grows naturally from the field and the wild animals can finish what's left. Follow the same procedure for your vineyards and olive groves.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You have six days to do your work, but on the seventh day you must stop working, so that your ox and your donkey can rest, and your slaves' families can catch their breath, as well as the foreigners living among you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make sure to pay attention to everything I've told you. Don't think to call on the names of other gods—you must not even mention them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Three times every year you are to celebrate a feast dedicated to me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You are to observe the Festival of Unleavened Bread as I instructed you.  You are to eat bread without yeast for seven days at the appropriate time in the month of Abib, because that was the month you left Egypt. No one can come before me without bringing an offering.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You are also to observe the Festival of Harvest when you present the firstfruits of the produce from what you've sown in the fields. Lastly you are to observe the Festival of Gathering-In the Harvest at the end of the year, when you gather in the harvest of the rest of your crops from the field.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Every Israelite male is to come before the Lord God at these three times every year.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You must not offer the blood of my sacrifices together with anything that contains yeast, and the fat from the offerings presented at my festival must not be left until morning.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Bring the best firstfruits of your crops to the house of the Lord your God. Don't cook a young goat in its mother's milk.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Look, I'm sending an angel ahead of you to protect you on the way and to take you to the place I've prepared for you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make sure you pay attention to him and do what he says. Don't oppose him, because he won't forgive rebellion, for he carries my authority.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: However, if you listen to him carefully, and do everything that I tell you, then I will be an enemy to your enemies and I will fight those who fight against you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For my angel will go ahead of you and take you into the land of the Amorites, Hittites, Perizzites, Canaanites, Hivites, and Jebusites, and I will wipe them out.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You must not bow down to their gods or worship them or follow their pagan practices. No, you must demolish their idols and smash their sacred pillars into pieces.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You are to worship the Lord your God, and he will bless your food and water. I will make sure none of you fall sick.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: No woman will have a miscarriage or be without children. I will make sure you live long lives.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will send terror about me ahead of you which will throw every nation you meet into panic. I will make all your enemies turn and run away.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will send hornets ahead of you to drive out before you the Hivites and Canaanites and Hittites.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will not drive them out in just one year, because the land would become desolate and you would have to deal with increased numbers of wild animals.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Bit by bit I will drive them out ahead of you, until there are enough of you to take possession of the land.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will fix your borders from the Red Sea to the Sea of the Philistines,  and from the desert to the Euphrates River. I will hand the inhabitants of the land over to you, and you will drive them out.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You must not make any agreement with them or with their gods.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They must not be allowed to stay in your land, otherwise they will lead you to sin against me. For if you worship their gods, they will definitely become a trap for you.
segments.speaker: God
